dos_donts.dont: Assume row count = distinct ID count without checking

dos_donts.do: Comment-out log row counts next to table creation code
Use inline subquery pull then join for claims
dos_donts.dont: Join claims tables on the first pull

dos_donts.do: Use FIRST. DATA step logic for top-ranked row per ID
dos_donts.dont: Use NODUPKEY to select a ranked row per ID

dos_donts.do: Use three-condition date overlap for concurrent claims
Include Medicare FFS in concurrent claim pulls
dos_donts.dont: Pull only APCD claims for concurrency checks

dos_donts.do: Use UNION ALL when stacking yearly tables
Put date filters on joined tables in the ON clause
dos_donts.dont: Put right-table date filters in the WHERE clause

dos_donts.do: Use explicit parentheses in complex WHERE / CASE conditions
dos_donts.dont: Rely on implicit AND / OR precedence

dos_donts.do: Macro-ize year variable for multi-year pulls
dos_donts.dont: Hard-code years in repeated code blocks

dos_donts.do: Use native tables for frequently referenced member data
dos_donts.dont: Use SAS views for repeated lookups
